PAR.Comment: FSE - Can be written via CAN - Index 17
PAR.Name: Torque command value

PAR.Comment: FSE - Can be temporary written via CAN - Index 13
PAR.Name: Positive torque limit

PAR.Comment: FSE - Can be temporary written via CAN - Index 14
PAR.Name: Negative torque limit

PAR.Comment: FSE - Can be read via CAN - Index 19
PAR.Name: Torque feedb.val

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX - Optimization possible
PAR.Name: Prop.gain speed control

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX - Optimization possible
PAR.Name: Integr.act.time sp.ctrl

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX - Optimization possible
PAR.Name: Diff.time speed control

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Motor peak current

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Motor nom. current

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet - Optimization possible max. 20000
PAR.Name: Maximum speed

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX - Start derating Firmware (torque limitation) Optimization possible
PAR.Name: Overload limit motor

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Motor type

PAR.Comment: FSE - Can be read via CAN - Index 8
PAR.Name: Temperature internal

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Nom. motor voltage

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet - Maximum field-weakening current above the nominal speed
PAR.Name: Magnet. current IM

PAR.Comment: * Motor data sheet: 0 = No FSE function *
PAR.Name: Magnet. current IM1

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Nom. torque

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Nom. velocity

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Rotor time constant

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Pole number motor

PAR.Comment: FSE - Read only - Actual field-weakening current (scaling 0.1) (ID32827 = ID33185)
PAR.Name: Magn.curr.feedb.

PAR.Comment: FSE - Read only - Actual torque current (scaling 0.1) (ID32834 = ID33186)
PAR.Name: Torque curr.feedback

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX -! Adjustment necessary ! P encoder AND field weakening synchronous motor
PAR.Name: Encoder type

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX - Start derating Firmware (torque limitation) Optimization possible
PAR.Name: Overload limit inverter

PAR.Comment: FSE - Can be read via CAN - Index 8
PAR.Name: Temperature internal

PAR.Comment: FSE - Can be read via CAN - Index 8
PAR.Name: Temperature external

PAR.Comment: FSE - Read only - Size from the status-oriented coordinate system
PAR.Name: Actual current Ia

PAR.Comment: FSE - Read only - Size from the status-oriented coordinate system
PAR.Name: Actual current Ib

PAR.Comment: FSE - Read only - Size from the status-oriented coordinate system
PAR.Name: Voltage Ua

PAR.Comment: FSE - Read only - Size from the status-oriented coordinate system
PAR.Name: Voltage Ub

PAR.Comment: FSE - Read only - Actual field-weakening current (scaling 0.001) (ID32827 = ID33185)
PAR.Name: Magn.curr.feedb.

PAR.Comment: FSE - Read only - Actual torque current (scaling 0.001) (ID32834 = ID33186)
PAR.Name: Torque curr.feedback

PAR.Name: Inductance LD

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Inductance LQ

PAR.Name: TN current Q

PAR.Name: TN current D

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Standstill current

PAR.Name: Kp V.contr.gain

PAR.Name: V contr.int.time

PAR.Name: Kp current Q

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet - Optimization possible * field weakening id current control *
PAR.Name: Kp current D

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet -
PAR.Name: Part number motor

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet - (0.135)
PAR.Name: Resistance Rtt

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX - ! Adjustment necessary ! 140 degrees switch-off temperature
PAR.Name: Temperature sensor motor

PAR.Comment: FSE - Adjust with AIPEX see motor data sheet - 0
PAR.Name: Inductance Ltt

PAR.Name: Upper threshold current adap

PAR.Name: Gradient KpQ

PAR.Name: Gradient TnQ

PAR.Name: Resistance Rs

PAR.Name: Voltage constant Ke

PAR.Name: increase motor voltage

PAR.Name: Voltage reserve
